market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to Jack’s entire‑home retreat, perfectly sized for up to four guests who need space, speed and flexibility. Rated 4.8 stars from 205 reviews, this property delivers a comfortable living area, a fully equipped kitchen, two well‑appointed bedrooms and a clean bathroom—all under one roof. Fast, reliable Wi‑Fi makes it ideal for contractors, remote workers or anyone planning a longer stay. At £122.4 per night, you’re paying 21 % less than the city’s median nightly rate of £154.60, giving you premium value without compromising on comfort. The home is located in a quiet neighbourhood with easy access to major transport routes, making daily commutes simple. While Jack is new to hosting, his commitment to a spotless, well‑maintained space shines through in the high guest satisfaction score. With 73 open nights out of the next 90, there’s plenty of opportunity to book your stay now and enjoy a hassle‑free experience. Whether you’re overseeing a renovation project, need a base for an extended work assignment, or simply want a peaceful getaway, this property offers the right mix of space, speed and savings. Book today and experience why guests consistently rate their stay 4.8 out of 5.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright exterior/front‑facade shot as the cover photo to immediately convey location and curb appeal; follow with living room, kitchen, bedroom and bathroom images to ensure full room coverage.
key_diagnosis: Despite a 21% lower nightly rate (£122.4 vs median £154.60), occupancy is only 18.5% booked versus the market median of 47.8% – improve visibility and SEO to translate price advantage into bookings.
No high‑value amenities are listed; adding outdoor space, parking, and entertainment could boost appeal for long‑stay guests and raise occupancy.
Photo count is unknown, but listings in this market typically show 8‑10 images; ensure at least one photo for each major room and a compelling cover to meet guest expectations.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your nightly rate is £122.4, which is 21% below the market median, yet your next‑90‑day occupancy is only 18.5%—there’s huge untapped demand you can capture.
